J. SCHNEEBERGER Maschinen AG
Precision grinding machines since 1923, for tool manufacturing for profile and production grinding tasks
J. SCHNEEBERGER Maschinen AG develop and produce the most modern CNC grinding machines for the manufacturing and re-grinding of cutting tools and the production of a variety of precision parts.
SCHNEEBERGER is represented in all important markets with their own sales and service branch offices or qualified partners. The customers include companies from tool manufacturing, the automotive industry and its suppliers, from general machine builders, the aerospace industry, energy technology and job shop.

News from SCHNEEBERGER
Visit SCHNEEBERGER at CCMT 2026, the biggest Machinetool and Tooling Show in the Yangtze River Delta
The rise of battery-electric cars, humanoid robots and the exploration of Mars have one thing in common: the need for small module gears and threads produced by forming processes. Come and see SCHNEEBERGER’s exhibition highlights at CCMT Shanghai.
Read more
A new Era of High-Performance Grinding begins with SCHNEEBERGER
Join the global launch of the new generation Norma at GrindingHub 2026. Experience superior performance in flexible 5-axis grinding - engineered for precision and efficiency.
Read more
With the new HAAS UMC 1000 5-axis milling machine featuring a pallet pool, SCHNEEBERGER is expanding its manufacturing capacity and laying the groundwork for efficient operations.
Automation makes it possible to make optimal use of off-peak hours and produce small batches cost-effectively. This investment is a key step in SCHNEEBERGER’s production strategy: a high degree of manufacturing depth and autonomy, enabling the company to respond flexibly and quickly to customer requests.
Read more
